developer_response.body: We're very sorry for this and we're on it!

reviews.review_description: This game is very fun but can get boring at times. It  gets unexciting when it’s just exhibition and a career mode would make this game so so good. If you were a custom team and went through custom A.I leagues it would be so fun. Or just tournaments with real players to keep it exciting. I also with that your exhibition team had seperate players for positions. I with the striker had this name, identity, and stats white the winger has a different name, identity, and stats and so on instead of one player as the whole team. Adding seperate players would make the game way better in general. I also with there were better stadiums that were more immersive with walkouts, a lot of fans, and all the cool details a real stadium includes. On the keeper side I with there was a button to grab the ball when keeper. And maybe even a dive button where you press the corresponding button and flick the joystick to which direction you dive and it would work like that.  Another keeper a ditto on would be adding a place in training that could help you practice your keeping. Lastly, as hard as it might be I would highly appreciate  a little more realistic gameplay if that’s possible. I know it’s supposed to be more fast and fun than normal soccer but it would be more authentic if fields were longer and it felt more like the beautiful game.  As you can tell it took a long time to write and that’s because I  can tell how good this game would be if this stuff happens. Thanks you for your one!

We Are Soccer puts you in a VR soccer environment where you’re hitting, passing, juggling and moving your arms and body to control the ball and play with others. The realistic physics and multiplayer focus can absolutely get you moving a lot and working up a real sweat when you’re trying hard or playing competitive matches.  ￼
	•	It’s designed as an active experience — not a passive sitting game — so if you go all-out (running, kicking, quick reactions), it can feel like a fitness session.
	•	Players often describe soccer in VR as physical because swinging your arms and moving around naturally simulates real effort.  ￼

reviews.review_title: Why I love we are soccer
reviews.review_description:
We Are Soccer
I’ve played a lot of VR sports games, but We Are Soccer genuinely captured my heart. From the moment you step onto the pitch, there’s this perfect blend of realism and arcade fun that feels natural and engaging. The physics are smooth and responsive, the environments are vibrant, and the matches truly get your adrenaline going like real soccer.
What I appreciate most is how intuitive the controls and gameplay are. You don’t need a long tutorial; you can jump right in and start enjoying yourself. The game rewards both skill and creativity, and every goal feels meaningful.
It’s clear the developers put real passion and care into building this game. The attention to detail, the lively atmosphere, and the thoughtful game modes make this more than just a VR game. It feels like a place you want to return to again and again.
If you love soccer or simply want a fun, energetic VR game that consistently delivers a great experience, this one stands out as a favorite.

I really suggest this game as it has a lot of fun things to offer. It is so fun and you can make a lot of friends. You can use your head, feet, chest and even more to kick the ball. I love this game. 

I recommend getting it if you’re in to football/soccer. there’s also competitive things in this game like a league called WASA with its own items. In the recent update there is big collabs within the game so get this game to try out their boots! also there is now two new leagues with items like EVL and VFL!


it’s a well ran game with really active developers who  listen to their fans! The updates happen very frequently and the owners are always looking to make their game even better. 

There is even an in game currency called ultras where you can play in the arcade to try and  earn tickets which you can buy cosmetics with. Also, with the ultras you can go to the “WE STORE” and buy boots, balls, glasses and even kits so why don’t you hop on 


 If you are a CC and looking to post videos on this game  hop into the discord and see what the requirements are. for JR CC it is 30k views on your WAS videos. For CC it is 100k on your WAS videos! 
 HOP ON WE ARE SOCCER TO SEE IT ALL LIVE!

see you on the field!

reviews.review_title: ⭐ We Are Soccer VR — A Passionate Review
reviews.review_description:
From the moment I stepped into the world of We Are Soccer VR, I knew this wasn’t just another VR sports title — it was something special. What truly made me fall in love with WAS is how effortlessly it captures the joy, freedom, and social spirit of soccer in virtual reality. It’s not just about scoring goals — it’s about being in the game, feeling every touch, and sharing those moments with friends.  ￼

⸻

⚽ What I Love Most About the Game

🔥 1. Realistic Ball Physics & Control
The way the ball responds — whether you’re dribbling, shooting, or passing — feels incredibly intuitive. The physics give weight and realism to each touch, making you feel like you’re actually shaping the play with your own feet and body.  ￼

👥 2. Fun Multiplayer Action
WAS shines brightest when you bring others into the experience. Team up for 1v1, 2v2, or 3v3 matches and feel that rush of cooperative play. The game turns into an instant hangout — full of laughs, teamwork, and competitive energy.  ￼

🎨 3. Creative and Immersive Hangout Zones
The massive soccer park isn’t just fields — it’s a vibrant play space. Whether you want to practice tricks, explore sandbox-style areas, or just mess around with friends, there’s always something to do. It’s VR soccer with personality.  ￼

👕 Player Customization
Being able to personalize your avatar and playstyle adds so much depth. It makes every game feel personal, like you’re not just playing soccer — you’re creating your own soccer story.

⸻

🔮 The Future of We Are Soccer VR

I genuinely believe We Are Soccer VR has huge potential ahead:
	•	Expanded Game Modes: Imagine tournament leagues, ranked matches, or even co-op objective modes.
	•	Enhanced Social Features: Deeper communication tools, shared replays, and community events could take the social vibe even further.
	•	Cross-Platform Play: Opening up matches across devices would bring even more players together.
	•	Improved Training Drills: Skill challenges or VR tutorials could help players refine their soccer technique in fun ways.

The core experience already feels complete, but there’s so much room to grow — and I can’t wait to see where the developers take it next.  ￼

⸻

🏆 Final Thoughts

We Are Soccer VR isn’t just a game — it’s a celebration of the sport we all love, brought to life in a way that only VR can. Whether you’re a casual player, a soccer fanatic, or someone looking for a fun social experience, WAS has something magical to offer. From its immersive gameplay to its vibrant multiplayer hangouts, this game has carved out a special place in my VR library — and in my heart.

Highly recommended for anyone who’s ever dreamed of living their soccer moment — without limits.

reviews.review_title: Best Fastest Growing Football VR Game
reviews.review_description:
We Are Soccer,
To Gorilla Tag Physics To Joystick Movement, Its An Endless World Full of Sporty Fun, Theres Even an Arcade That You Spend Your Tickets on WAS Drip!

There Are Loads of Cosmetics to Choose From, A Magma Boot with a Fire Affect to a UCL Ball!, If You Meet a Famous WAS Creator Such as Blueduck, BABA Ect, Theres a Chance they Could Give you there Boots If You Win a Challenge or there Generous, If Your Very Lucky, You Can Win The CC’s Custom Jersey!

This is a Football Sided Game, You Can Play Anywhere At Anytime; You can Play Football on a Pitch, Theres Beach, Even a Ice-hockey Rink!, But We Also Cannot Forget the Generous and Kind Community, With Kind Players, If they Call You Bad?, Theres A Report Button in Your Menu (Press The Three Lines To Access Your Menu, In this Menu You Can Change Your Avatar, You Even Get Hookeed Up With Some Free Drip To Make Your First Impressions to the WAS World!

If People call You Bad or Buns, Theres a Training Center to the Left Of Where you Spwan, You Can Practice Your Shots, Even Your Headers and Vollies!, Theres Even Mini-Games To Play, Such as Taking Shots on a Robot Keeper, A Wheel-spin to Win 10 Ultras, And  Even A Net That if you Score, You Get Ultras!

Ultras Are an In-Game Currency that You Can Obtain If A Content Creator Sends You Some, Buy Them With Real Life Money Or Win them in the Training Center!
If Your Thinking About Downloading We Are Soccer, You Definitely Should!, So What Are you Waiting For?, Go Win Some Ultras and Meet You Favourite CC’s

See Ya!

reviews.review_title: Why I fell in love with was
reviews.review_description:
I really fell in love with We Are Soccer because it didn’t feel like I was playing a game — it felt like I was actually on the pitch 🥽⚽. The way you can look around, move freely, and react with your whole body makes everything feel real. When I scored, passed, or made a good play, the adrenaline hit hard 🔥🙌 and it genuinely felt rewarding.

What hooked me the most was how connected I felt to every moment. My movements mattered, my decisions mattered, and that made the experience feel personal 💪😄. It gave me confidence and that focused, locked-in feeling where you forget about everything else 🧠✨.

I’d take the headset off and still feel the excitement after — like I’d just finished a real match. That feeling of presence, immersion, and pure enjoyment is what made me fall in love with the game ❤️⚽.

To TheBlueDuck — thank you for this masterpiece 💙🦆🔥
